content.full_text:
FEB 29 11 08 AM '92

FEB. 21, 1992

I'm treasurer of the Committee To Recall in Pacifica.
I.D. # 910744. I would like a written reply to these
questions.

1.) Can Committee funds be used for a victory party the
night of the election?

2.) Can Committee funds also be used for a Thank You
event for all the workers and active supporters of the
recall. This event would take place before the end of March.
The event would be like a picnic, pot luck dinner or
something of that nature?

I'll be going on vacation on 3/07/92, so if its possible
can I have the reply by that date.

Thank You,

Elaine R. Murphy
293 Juanita Ave.
Pacifica, Ca 94044

Special Election will be held of 3/10/92

Home Phone (415) 359-5932
